hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodations: Fandee Island in Tad Lo offers treehouses, tiny houses, and zipline experiences. Guests enjoy lake views, private entrances, and balconies.
Comfortable Amenities: The lodge features a sun terrace, garden, open-air bath, restaurant, and free WiFi in public areas. Additional facilities include a lounge, coffee shop, and outdoor seating.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves French, Thai, local, Asian, and European cuisines. Brunch, lunch, and dinner are available, including vegetarian options.
Activities and Location: Guests can enjoy hiking, picnics, and scenic views. The property is 89 km from Pakse International Airport and near Tad Lo Waterfall. Highly rated for its lakes and scenic views.
